visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a close-up of a young woman wearing a white The North Face fleece jacket and a black beanie, looking thoughtfully at the camera in a bright office setting. Two male colleagues are seated behind her at a wooden desk, one in a red shirt and the other in a yellow shirt. (2) The scene transitions to the trio eating large burgers and donuts in a medium shot. They take big bites and show expressions of immense satisfaction. The office background features modern furniture and a 'Refresh Station' in the distance. (3) They are seen drinking from yellow polka-dot cups with straws. The woman raises her arm enthusiastically while laughing. The camera framing remains at a medium distance, capturing their group dynamic and expressive hand gestures. (4) A segment follows focusing on fried chicken. One man examines a drumstick closely while the woman holds a wing. A brief visual flame effect appears on the screen to emphasize their discussion. (5) The final phase shows the three characters speaking directly to the camera, pointing and gesturing to promote an upcoming event. Various text overlays and graphic icons appear around them as they laugh and move energetically.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 中午要吃什麼?!. (2) [Subtitle]: (對面的同事a.k.a宇宙人?!). (3) [Subtitle]: 方Q. [Subtitle]: 小玉. [Subtitle]: 要吃什麼?. (4) [Slogan]: 用呼吸投票吃什麼?. (5) [Subtitle]: 這肉不得了. [Subtitle]: 好吃. (6) [Slogan]: 正餐吃完來點下午茶. (7) [Subtitle]: 這時候吃甜點剛剛好. (8) [Subtitle]: (不可能不喝吧?!). [Subtitle]: 珍奶!. (9) [Subtitle]: 來了. (10) [Subtitle]: 嗯~. [Subtitle]: 有半年沒喝. [Subtitle]: 我昨天沒喝. [Subtitle]: 我聽了什麼?. (11) [Subtitle]: 炸雞. [Subtitle]: 炸雞就是要吃雞腿. [Subtitle]: 意外引發一場戰役. (12) [Subtitle]: 我是雞翅.... (13) [Subtitle]: (不去怎麼行?). [Subtitle]: 宇宙人演唱會. [Slogan]: 12/20. [Slogan]: 宇宙人. (14) [Variety]: \XDDD/. (15) [Subtitle]: 這個節奏太快. [Slogan]: 12/20. [Slogan]: 宇宙人. [Slogan]: @回到未來1986. [Slogan]: 小巨蛋演唱會. (16) [Subtitle]: 不見不散一起去看~. [Subtitle]: 走走走. [Subtitle]: 一定要來喔~. visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator in white fleece, 2 male band members sitting behind and joining in.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The woman wears a white The North Face fleece and a black knit beanie. One man has longish dark hair and wears a red shirt with glasses; the other man has dark hair and wears a yellow shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern open-plan office with long wooden tables, white walls, storage lockers, and a glass-door refrigerator labeled 'Refresh Station'.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a bright female voice asking what to eat, accompanied by an upbeat acoustic guitar BGM and a high-pitched 'ding' SFX. The atmosphere is energetic and clear. (2) As the group starts eating, short 'munching' and 'crunching' sound effects are inserted. Overlapping voices express delight with phrases like 'Delicious' and vocalizations like 'Mmm'. The BGM continues with a steady 4/4 beat. (3) A loud 'slurp' sound effect transitions into the woman's excited laughter. The voices are high-pitched and high-arousal. A bubble 'pop' SFX marks a text appearance. (4) The male voice dominates briefly with an authoritative but humorous tone about chicken legs, followed by a 'whoosh' transition sound and a simulated 'fire' roar sound effect for comedic impact. (5) The final phase features rapid-fire dialogue where the trio promotes an event. Multiple 'ding' and UI sound effects occur as text pops up. The voices are loud and cheerful, ending with a group 'go go go' chant and a final melodic jingle.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Demonstration -> Call to Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the 'Cosmos People' (宇宙人) concert on December 20th by using a relatable office lunch scenario to build engagement and excitement.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct mention of concert dates, location (Taipei Arena), and the band name 'Cosmos People' (宇宙人).

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video successfully blends lifestyle food content with a musical performance advertisement. The fast editing and high SFX density are typical of social-native short-form marketing.
